title: Welcome to 4kwallpaper Stories
subtitle: Your first post - The power of simplicity in sharing ideas
content:
Welcome to 4kwallpaper! This is your first story post.

How to add more posts:

1. Go to the 'posts' folder in your GitHub repository
2. Click 'Add file' → 'Create new file'
3. Name it something like 'my-post.json'
4. Use this format:

{
  "title": "Your Post Title",
  "subtitle": "Short description",
  "content": "Your full story...",
  "date": "2026-06-19"
}

5. Click 'Commit changes'

Your post will appear instantly on the home page! The feed automatically ranks posts by views, freshness, and engagement - just like Medium.

Enjoy sharing your stories!
